title: Project Miner Local Executor Closeout Intake Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local executor closeout intake panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Executor Closeout Detail, existing #executor-closeout anchor target, aria label, eight closeout checklist items, labels/details, count text, checkbox behavior, clear button, existing candidate-scoped storage key, export inclusion, dynamic derived-state behavior, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seams, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local executor closeout intake panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the Local executor closeout intake aria label and #executor-closeout anchor target.
Keep the panel inside Executor Closeout Detail.

Preserve the existing eight closeout checklist items, labels/details, count text, checkbox behavior, clear button, existing candidate-scoped storage key, export inclusion, dynamic derived-state behavior, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, operating-queue disclosure, import-exception-register disclosure, workflow-gates disclosure, exception/decision detail disclosure, admission/approval contract disclosure, local-review-checklist disclosure, and local-approval-decision-draft disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible closeout controls, eight closeout-control labels, no disclosure-state localStorage keys, unchanged disabled/enabled clear button behavior, unchanged two-check count transition, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 100 recommended PM Lane 101 as Project Miner Local Executor Closeout Intake Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration closeout-intake ergonomics slice. A separate read-only PM Lane 102 scout completed during this tranche and recommended Project Miner Local Field Readiness Checklist Disclosure Controls as the next tiny non-overlapping lane. The scout made no edits, staged nothing, ran no validation, and did not touch Supabase, Render, Vercel, Olares, or macros.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page Local executor closeout intake panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open local-executor-closeout disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.

No executor closeout checklist item detail change.
No executor closeout checklist item count change.
No candidate-scoped closeout storage key change.

No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
